title: cyperus echinolepis
intro: Cyperus echinolepis, also known as the spiny umbrella sedge or umbrella sedge, is a type of plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Cyperus echinolepis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
